work_experience.responsibilities: Engaged in academic projects focusing on network design, cybersecurity, data analytics, AI, and software development within the university environment, applying theoretical knowledge to practical scenarios.

projects.name: Enterprise Network Design & Deployment
projects.description: Designed and deployed enterprise networks for multi-branch organizations, including building and securing enterprise Wi-Fi systems.

projects.name: VLAN, VPN Configuration & NAP Implementation
projects.description: Configured VLANs and VPNs, and implemented Network Access Protection.

projects.name: Keylogging Detection Research & Implementation
projects.description: Researched and implemented methods for keylogging detection.

projects.name: Encryption Methods Study
projects.description: Studied various encryption methods to ensure secure data transmission.

projects.name: Recommendation System
projects.description: Developed a recommendation system leveraging Singular Value Decomposition and Collaborative Filtering techniques.

projects.name: Mining Massive Data Sets with PySpark
projects.description: Applied association rules and Machine Learning techniques using PySpark for mining massive data sets.

projects.name: Business Intelligence System Analysis for Co.op Mart
projects.description: Analyzed and managed a Business Intelligence system for Co.op Mart, contributing to e-commerce strategies and decision-making processes.

projects.name: Vietnamese NER & Attention Mechanisms Research
projects.description: Experimented with Vietnamese Named Entity Recognition using ML/DL, and researched Attention mechanisms for machine translation and medical text extraction.

projects.name: Basic Chat Application
projects.description: Designed and developed a basic chat application utilizing TCP/UDP protocols.

projects.name: E-commerce Website
projects.description: Developed an e-commerce website using PHP, HTML/CSS, hosted on XAMPP.

projects.name: Salesforce CRM Deployment & Customization
projects.description: Deployed and customized a Customer Relationship Management (CRM) system using Salesforce.
